text.title: Azure Architecture (Well-Architected + Landing Zones) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Single subscription + single team + no compliance scope?

conclusion.verdict: Use a simple resource-group structure; revisit when scope grows.
Full LZ: 3+ MG hierarchy + policy initiative + PIM + immutable backup
Mid-LZ: 3-MG hierarchy + baseline policy + PIM-eligible for Owner only

text.example: small_scope=false → regulated=true → Full LZ. References rule policy-initiative-enforced.
